About

The person behind
the numbers

I'm Harsh Shetye, a performance marketer with hands-on experience running paid campaigns for brands across e-commerce, beauty, health, real estate and education — from India to Kuwait and Saudi Arabia.

I've managed campaigns for Mawada, Miniso Kuwait, Stax, Curlnation, Ostello, Snowy Glow, HP, Kalash and more. My approach: understand the audience, test relentlessly, and make every rupee earn its place.

Meta Ads Google Ads YouTube Ads Audience Research Funnel Strategy Analytics Campaign Scaling
Services

What I do for
your brand

Every service built around one goal — profitable growth.

01
Campaign Strategy & Setup
End-to-end campaign architecture — objectives, structure, creatives and targeting built to convert from day one.
02
Audience Research & Targeting
Deep audience segmentation, lookalike building and interest layering to reach the people most likely to buy.
03
Campaign Optimization & Scaling
Continuous A/B testing, bid strategy refinement and budget scaling — turning good campaigns into great ones.
04
Analytics & Reporting
Clear, jargon-free performance reports with insights that actually inform your next move.
05
Full Funnel Management
From awareness to conversion — managing the entire paid journey so no potential customer falls through the cracks.
